features: Quality: Heel Grip Liner Is Made With High Quality Suede Leather Material Which Is Durable Portable Non Toxic Odorless Self Adhesive Breathable Eco Friendly Soft Flexible And Cushioned Heel Grips For High Heels Will Come In A Pack Of 3 Pairs (Pack Of 6)

Easy To Use: Suede Heel Liners Are Easy To Use Ensure Your Heel Of The Shoe Is Dry And Clean Then Remove The Back Paper And Press The Suede Heel Grips Onto The Upper Part Of The Heel Always Use The Shoehorn When Putting On Shoes While Containing Heel Grip Now You Are Ready To Go

Thick Heel Grips: Heel Grip Liners Will Distribute Pressure To Minimize Your Stress They Will Reduce Heel Pain Rubbing Slipping Out Skin Irritations That Are Caused By Standing Walking And Running Use Them With Loafers New Loose Shoes High Heels Sneakers Work Shoe Flats Leather Shoes Etc

Self Adhesive: Our Heel Cushion Pads Have Strong Self Adhesion So No Need To Worry About Slippage Of Heel Grips Anymore They Adhere Pretty Nicely To The Back Of Your Shoe They Are Grey In Color And Its One Size Fits All For More Comfortable Foot Grips

Suitable For: Shoe Pads For Comfort Suitable For All Ages Of Women Men And Children They Are Essential For Wearing Ladies Who Wear High Heels All Day They Prevent Your Feet From Scratches And Blisters They Will Provide You With The Best Comfortable Feel
description: Product description Suede Heel Grips One Size Fits All Men And Women Soft Shoe High Heel Cushion Pads For Loose Shoes Grey Color Self Adhesive Thick Heel Protector Liner For Stop Rubbing Slipping Out (Pack Of 6) Quality The Heel Grip Liner Is Made With High-Quality Suede Leather Material Which Is Durable Portable Non-Toxic Odorless Self Adhesive Breathable Eco-Friendly Soft Flexible And Cushioned How To Use? Suede Heel Liners Are Easy To Use Ensure Your Heel Of The Shoe Is Dry And Clean Then Remove The Back Paper And Press The Suede Heel Grips Onto The Upper Part Of The Heel Always Use The Shoehorn When Putting On Shoes While Containing Heel Grip Now You Are Ready To Go Suitable For Shoe Pads For Comfort Suitable For All Ages Of Women Men And Children Essential For Wearing Ladies Who Wear High Heels All Day Prevent Your Feet From Scratches And Blisters Will Provide You With The Best Comfortable Feel Feature Heel Grip Liners Will Distribute Pressure To Minimize Your Stress Will Reduce Heel Pain Rubbing Slipping Out Skin Irritations That Are Caused By Standing Walking And Running Use Them With Loafers New Loose Shoes High Heels Sneakers Work Shoe Flats Leather Shoes Etc Our Heel Cushion Pads Have Strong Self Adhesion So No Need To Worry About Slippage Of Heel Grips Anymore They Adhere Pretty Nicely To The Back Of Your Shoe They Are Grey In Color It's One Size Fits All For More Comfortable Foot Grips High Heel grips Will Come In A Pack Of 3 Pairs (Pack Of 6) Indications Cushioning, Heel Pain Relief, Skin Irritation Reduction Directions Ensure your heel of the shoe is dry and clean, then remove the back paper and press the suede heel grips onto the upper part of the heel. Always use the shoehorn when putting on shoes while containing heel grip. Now you are ready to go. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if you have any foot injuries or conditions that may be aggravated by the use of these heel grips. Always ensure the shoe is dry and clean before application. Use a shoehorn when putting on shoes to avoid injury. If irritation or discomfort occurs, discontinue use and consult a healthcare professional. See more
